0.5s ease'}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600},children:[globalProgress,"%"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:11,opacity:0.6},children:t.progress}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',gap:16,marginTop:18},children:[{label:t.lines,val:progress.metroLinesViewed.length,total:totalMetro},{label:t.themes,val:progress.dailyCatsViewed.length,total:totalDaily},{label:t.phrases,val:progress.phrasesPlayed.length,total:totalPhrases}].map(s=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{textAlign:'center'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{fontSize:22,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:'var(--font-display)'},children:[s.val,/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{fontSize:12,opacity:0.5},children:["/",s.total]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:10,opacity:0.6},children:s.label})]},s.label))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'grid',gridTemplateColumns:'1fr 1fr',gap:10,marginBottom:20},children:[{to:'/metro',icon:'🚇',title:t.metroCard,sub:t.metroCardSub,color:'var(--navy)'},{to:'/quotidien',icon:'🛒',title:t.dailyCard,sub:t.dailyCardSub,color:'var(--teal)'},{to:'/phrases',icon:'💬',title:t.phrasesCard,sub:t.phrasesCardSub,color:'#F5A623'},{to:'/phrases?cat=urgences',icon:'🆘',title:t.urgCard,sub:t.urgCardSub,color:'var(--coral)'}].map(card=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:card.to,style:{background:'var(--white)',borderRadius:'var(--radius-md)',padding:'16px 14px',border:'1px solid var(--gray-100)',boxShadow:'var(--shadow-sm)',textDecoration:'none',display:'block',transition:'transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:24,marginBottom:8},children:card.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontFamily:'var(--font-display)',fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:'var(--gray-800)',marginBottom:2},children:card.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:12,color:'var(--gray-400)'},children:card.sub})]},card.to))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontFamily:'var(--font-display)',fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:'var(--gray-600)',textTransform:'uppercase',letterSpacing:1,marginBottom:10},children:t.tipsTitle}),tips.map((tip,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{background:'var(--white)',borderRadius:'var(--radius-md)',padding:'12px 14px',marginBottom:10,borderLeft:`3px solid ${tip.border}`,boxShadow:'var(--shadow-sm)'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:tip.tagColor,background:tip.tagBg,padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:20,display:'inline-block',marginBottom:6,textTransform:'uppercase',letterSpacing:0.5},children:tip.tag}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:13,color:'var(--gray-800)',lineHeight:1.55},children:tip.text})]},i))]});}

{t.title}
{t.subtitle}
{globalProgress}%
{t.progress}
{[ { label: t.lines, val: progress.metroLinesViewed.length, total: totalMetro }, { label: t.themes, val: progress.dailyCatsViewed.length, total: totalDaily }, { label: t.phrases, val: progress.phrasesPlayed.length, total: totalPhrases }, ].map(s => (
{s.val}/{s.total}
{s.label}
))}
{[ { to: '/metro', icon: '🚇', title: t.metroCard, sub: t.metroCardSub, color: 'var(--navy)' }, { to: '/quotidien', icon: '🛒', title: t.dailyCard, sub: t.dailyCardSub, color: 'var(--teal)' }, { to: '/phrases', icon: '💬', title: t.phrasesCard, sub: t.phrasesCardSub, color: '#F5A623' }, { to: '/phrases?cat=urgences', icon: '🆘', title: t.urgCard, sub: t.urgCardSub, color: 'var(--coral)' }, ].map(card => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}
{card.sub}
))}
{t.tipsTitle}
{tips.map((tip, i) => (
{tip.tag}
{tip.text}
))}
); }
